nodes.name: 卡尔·林奈
nodes.summary: 卡尔·林奈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联115种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、角叫鴨、白臉樹鴨等115种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Tufted titmouse
nodes.summary: Tufted titmouse（Tufted titmouse，学名 Baeolophus bicolor），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于卡尔·林奈、俄亥俄河、密西西比河，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: 密西西比河
nodes.summary: 密西西比河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Tufted titmouse、黑紋背林鶯，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 俄亥俄河
nodes.summary: 俄亥俄河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Tufted titmouse、黑紋背林鶯，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The tufted titmouse (Baeolophus bicolor) is a small songbird native to eastern North America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Although it is nonmigratory and originally native to the Ohio and Mississippi River basins, factors such as bird feeders have caused it to occupy a larger territory across the United States and stretching into Ontario and Quebec in Canada. During the second half of the 20th century and into the 21st century, the species' range has been expanding northwards

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Although it is nonmigratory and originally native to the Ohio and Mississippi River basins, factors such as bird feeders have caused it to occupy a larger territory across the United States and stretching into Ontario and Quebec in Canada. During the second half of the 20th century and into the 21st century, the species' range has been expanding northwards

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The habitat of the tufted titmouse is deciduous and mixed woods, gardens, parks, and shrublands
